context: Tests whether the agent builds channel drill-down, category revenue share, revenue waterfall, and top products queries following the skill's specific patterns: COALESCE for attribution defaults, is_first_order for customer type, window function for revenue share, waterfall structure, CTEs with RANK() for top products, outlier filtering for AOV, and schema optimisation recommendations.

checklist.name: Channel COALESCE source
checklist.description: Channel drill-down SQL uses COALESCE(oa.source, 'direct') (or equivalent) to default NULL source values to 'direct'

checklist.name: Channel COALESCE medium
checklist.description: Channel drill-down SQL uses COALESCE(oa.medium, 'none') (or equivalent) to default NULL medium values to 'none'

checklist.name: New customer orders flag
checklist.description: Channel drill-down SQL counts new customer orders using o.is_first_order (or a CASE WHEN on is_first_order)

checklist.name: Revenue share window function
checklist.description: Category revenue SQL computes revenue share using a window function (SUM(...) OVER ()) rather than a correlated subquery or application-side division

checklist.name: Waterfall components
checklist.description: Revenue waterfall includes all four components: gross revenue (subtotal), discounts, refunds, AND shipping revenue

checklist.name: Waterfall net calculation
checklist.description: Waterfall net revenue is computed as gross - discounts - refunds + shipping (shipping is additive, not a deduction)

checklist.name: Top products uses two CTEs
checklist.description: Top products SQL uses two CTEs (one for current period, one for prior period) rather than a single query or subqueries

checklist.name: RANK() window function
checklist.description: Both CTEs in the top products query use RANK() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) to assign a rank to each product

checklist.name: Rank improvement column
checklist.description: Top products query includes a rank_improvement (or rank_change) column computed as prior_rank minus current_rank

checklist.name: LIMIT 20 on top products
checklist.description: Top products query has LIMIT 20 (returning exactly the top 20 products)

checklist.name: Index recommendation
checklist.description: schema-notes.md recommends adding an index on (status, created_at) on the orders table

checklist.name: Materialized view recommendation
checklist.description: schema-notes.md recommends using a view or materialized view for the complex revenue+attribution join, OR recommends a daily rollup table for long date ranges
